title: Headset settings are changed
scenario: Verify that headset settings changed on the mobile app are correctly reflected on the Lens tenant after refreshing the page.
steps: A mobile user registers a headset to a Lens tenant.
On the Lens tenant, navigate to the device (Inventory or Device user profile) and check the headset's settings values — they should match the mobile app.
Change a setting value on the mobile app, refresh the Lens tenant page, and verify the new values are now present on the Lens tenant.
expected: Headset settings changed on the mobile app are correctly reflected on the Lens tenant after refreshing the page.
